data.name: Vacation in Paradise
data.detailed_description:
Being the boss of a big company is a real challenge, but even you need a break, right?

A visual novel set in a sun-drenched resort atmosphere, filled with charming tales that weave the protagonist’s fate with beautiful girls!

  • Over 140 stunning anime-style images of beautiful girls!

  • Three unique heroines with intertwined stories waiting to be unraveled

  • Multiple endings based on your choices! Can you get the best ending?

You’re the boss of a major firm, and after years of hard work, you’ve finally taken a vacation. But what’s a vacation without someone special to share it with? So, you bring your loyal secretary, Beatrice. She’s always been there for you, and she deserves a break too.

But your idyllic resort romance is interrupted when you meet two more captivating women. Now, you face a difficult choice: remain true to Beatrice and your established relationship, or embark on a thrilling, unexplored adventure

Beatrice

Beatrice is the boss’s ever-loyal secretary and indispensable right hand. She’s always two steps ahead, anticipating every need. While their relationship is complex, she doesn’t shy away from it. She agreed to this trip seeking fresh air and a moment of simple tranquility

Emilia

A chance encounter on this idyllic island, but sadly, she’s here alone. Drawn to the boss, she seems open to spending time together. But can a meaningful relationship really blossom under the circumstances?

Mira

An enigmatic beauty. Her thoughts are nearly impossible to decipher. She’s disarmingly kind and open, seemingly making her an easy target for the boss. But it’s hard to say who is really hunting whom.

data.short_description: Sun, fun, and beautiful girls - what’s not to love? Dive into a world of over 140 stunning images, three captivating love interests, and multiple endings depending on your choices!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 俄文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Microsoft® Windows® 10/11
  • 處理器: 2GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX® 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS
  • 處理器: 2GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX® 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux
  • 處理器: 2GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX® 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

  • Storage: 1 GB available space
